neptune.dbsubnetgroup.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Neptune::DBSubnetGroup` type creates an Amazon Neptune DB subnet group. Subnet groups must contain at least two subnets in two different Availability Zones in the same AWS Region.

neptune.dbsubnetgroup.DBSubnetGroupDescr.Description: Provides the description of the DB subnet group.

neptune.dbsubnetgroup.DBSubnetGroupName.Description: The name of the DB subnet group.

neptune.dbsubnetgroup.SubnetIds.Description: The Amazon EC2 subnet IDs for the DB subnet group.

neptune.dbsubnetgroup.Tags.Description: The tags that you want to attach to the DB subnet group.
